text.title: django-pytest Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure to set up (or migrate to) the modern Django/pytest test stack.

list.item: Action: `uv add --dev pytest pytest-django factory_boy model_bakery hypothesis`. Pin `DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE` in `pyproject.toml [tool.pytest.ini_options]`.
Output: pytest runs and discovers tests.

section.title: Step 2 — Move setUp data to fixtures

list.item: Action: extract per-test data into `@pytest.fixture` functions in `tests/conftest.py`. Replace TestCase subclasses with plain functions.
Output: fixtures composable across tests; no inheritance chains.
Action: define factories in `tests/factories.py` (factory_boy) or use `baker.make` (model_bakery). Migrate inline creations.

section.title: Step 4 — Mark DB tests and use APIClient

list.item: Input: DB-touching tests; DRF endpoint tests.
Action: add `@pytest.mark.django_db` to DB tests. Migrate plain `Client` calls to `APIClient` + `force_authenticate(user=user)`.
Output: DB tests explicit; DRF tests use the right client.
Input: tests that mock internal services.
Action: stop mocking internal calls. Mock only HTTP, S3, third-party SDK, email backend. Use `responses` / `httpretty` / `boto3-stubs` / `django.test.override_settings(EMAIL_BACKEND=...)`.
Output: tests verify behaviour, not mocks.
